text:
- Update to 0.3.1.1
- ChangeLog: http://www.weechat.org/files/changelog/ChangeLog-0.3.1.1.html

- Remove FindIconv patch, committed upstream.
- Fix pkg-descr, due to an inadvertent change in last update PR.

Port maintainer (miwi@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.
